name: node-esutils
title: node-esutils
summary: utility box for ECMAScript language tools
description:
utility box for ECMAScript language tools
This package includes a few functions helping to use
AST (Abstract Syntaxt Tree) traversal functions from
estools bundle.
.
Estool is a code generator created from Mozilla's Parser
using Node.js.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-esutils because utility box for ECMAScript language tools.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-esutils as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-esutils with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-esutils --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
